meta.source: 500 Worlds: War on the Vespator Front
meta.description: Vespator Front map campaign — Planets, Infrastructure, Fleets, Operations, Theatres, missions

allianceTypes.Guardians: Protect Sangua Terra, repel invaders — Imperium forces

campaign.duration: Recommended 6 Campaign phases (~1 month each). Can be compressed for weekend events
campaign.warmaster: One player takes Campaign Master/Warmaster role — manages map, battle results, events

campaignMap.planets: Multiple planets on map — each with Power Level per alliance, Infrastructure locations, and orbit locations for Fleets

powerLevel.effect: Higher Power Level = advantages in battles at that planet

campaignMap.campaignPoints: CVP — tallied from combined Power Level across all planets + 3 if Stronghold undestroyed

STRONGHOLD.effect: When winning battle at this or connected planet — treat alliance Power Level as 1 higher or lower for Campaign Outcomes
STRONGHOLD.bonus: +3 Campaign points to alliance while undestroyed

STAGING_GROUNDS.effect: When fighting at this or connected planet — treat Power Level as 1 higher or lower for Mission Rules. Not cumulative

SUPPORT_FACILITY.effect: Planets at distance of 2 from this planet are considered connected (but not vice versa)

FORTIFICATION_LINE.effect: Minimum Power Level at this planet increased by 1. Each time a rule would reduce Power Level below minimum — one Fortification Line destroyed instead

infrastructure.destroying: When last Infrastructure location on a planet is destroyed — planet becomes uninhabitable. All Power Levels drop to 0. No Campaign Operations can target it

steps: Select Operations (each player selects one Campaign Operation per Fleet)
Perform Operations (reveal, resolve battles, build infrastructure, move fleets)

BATTLE_OPERATION.select: Choose Campaign Attack Type, target planet, and opposing alliance

attackTypes.SEIZE_POWER_BASE: Take over or destroy opponent's Infrastructure
attackTypes.PURGE_AND_BURN: Reduce opponent's Power Level by exterminating foe
attackTypes.ORBITAL_INVASION: Reduce opponent's Power Level by seizing beachhead
attackTypes.SUPPLY_BASE_RAID: Sabotage to reduce Power Level here or at connected planets
attackTypes.BOARDING_ACTION: Strike opponent's Fleet in orbit — force it to relocate

operations.VOID_LEAP_OPERATION: Move Fleet to any planet on map (not just connected)
operations.RAISE_EDIFICES_OPERATION: Build Fortification Line, Support Facility, or Staging Grounds at Fleet's current planet
operations.LOGISTICAL_AUXILIA_OPERATION: Until end of Campaign phase — when attacked on this or connected planet, your player can select the Theatre used (instead of attacker)
operations.DEPLOY_KILL_TEAMS_OPERATION: Select this or connected planet — roll D6 for each opposing alliance: on 5+, reduce their Power Level at that planet by 1

theatres.description: Attacker selects one Theatre from planet's available theatres. Roll D6 for Twist

SPACEPORT.tactical: Control objectives, reactive manoeuvring, Fall Back and act

twists.1_COORDINATE_LOCK: Controlled objectives stay controlled until opponent's Level of Control is greater at end of a phase
twists.2_VID_FEED_NETWORK: Each time unit Falls Back — choose: eligible to shoot OR eligible to charge that turn
twists.3_EMBARKATION_SHRINES: At end of each player's turn — opponent can select one unit within range of objective not in Engagement Range: place in Strategic Reserves

DESOLATE_WASTES.tactical: Swift INFANTRY and MOUNTED — aggressive deployment, repositioning

twists.1_OPEN_GROUND: Re-roll Advance and Charge rolls (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE)
twists.2_EYE_OF_JUDGEMENT: At end of Declare Battle Formations — each player selects up to 2 non-MONSTER/VEHICLE units: Scouts 6"
twists.3_EXPOSED_COMBATANTS: Ranged weapons on non-MONSTER/VEHICLE have ASSAULT

XENOFLORA_JUNGLE.tactical: Melee-heavy armies, improved damage and anti-overwatch

twists.2_GREEN_HELL: Units cannot use Fire Overwatch Stratagem
twists.3_PREDATORY_PLANTLIFE: Each time unit (not MONSTER/VEHICLE) Falls Back — all models take Desperate Escape test (-1 if Battle-shocked)

RAD_ZONE.tactical: Attritional — disrupts communications, reduces lethality, improves durability

twists.1_TOXIC_ASH_STORM: Round 2: max range 18". Round 3: max range 12". Round 4: max range 18" again
twists.2_RAD_MALAISE: +1 to Hit rolls in melee against units that charged this turn
twists.3_ESOTERIC_INTERFERENCE: Cannot gain additional CP outside of Command phase 1CP (no extra CP from any source)

FORGE_COMPLEX.tactical: Tough durable units. Lighter units take extra AP damage from extreme heat

twists.1_THERMIC_CORROSION: Attacks within 9" against non-MONSTER/VEHICLE — improve AP by 1
twists.2_PLASMIC_VENTING: At start of each round — Attacker rolls D6 (result <= current round = venting occurs). Roll D6 for each unit not within range of objective: if result >= Toughness, unit is pinned (-2" Move, -2 to Charge rolls)
twists.3_VOLATILE_COMBUSTIBLES: +1 to attacks determined for Blast weapons

HAB_SPRAWL.tactical: Dense terrain. INFANTRY in AREA TERRAIN gain survivability or lethality

twists.1_ROILING_FUMES: While wholly within AREA TERRAIN — model has Stealth
twists.2_FIRING_POSITIONS: While wholly within AREA TERRAIN — can be targeted with Fire Overwatch for 0CP. Hits on 5+ when resolving
twists.3_INTO_THE_DEPTHS: At end of each player's turn — opponent can select one unit wholly within AREA TERRAIN not in Engagement Range: place in Strategic Reserves

DELVESITE_FACILITY.tactical: Scavenged explosives and mining equipment help weaker units against tough targets

twists.1_SANCTIFIED_CHARGES: Each player secretly selects one No Man's Land objective. Once per battle when enemy ends move within range of it — reveal and roll D6: on 2+, D6+1 mortal wounds
twists.2_CRUMBLING_BEDROCK: When attacking within 12" — ignore any/all modifiers to BS, Hit roll, and Wound roll
twists.3_TECTONIC_SHOCK: Attacks targeting units within range of No Man's Land objectives have LETHAL HITS

DEAD_LANDS.tactical: Heavy armour — MONSTER and VEHICLE speed, durability, and lethality increased

twists.1_BLEAK_EXPANSE: +3" to Move of MONSTER and VEHICLE units
twists.2_ROCKY_OUTCROPPINGS: When MONSTER or VEHICLE Remains Stationary — re-roll Hit rolls of 1 for ranged attacks until end of turn
twists.3_SHROUD_OF_DUST: When MONSTER or VEHICLE makes Advance move — until start of next player's turn, Stealth ability

TOMB_COMPLEX.tactical: Unpredictable — eldritch energy effects suit varied armies

twists.2_OVERPOWERING_ENERGIES: When unit selected to shoot or fight — can use this. Until end of phase: +2 to Strength of weapons + weapons have HAZARDOUS
twists.3_QUANTUM_SHIELDING: Models have 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks

missionSequence: Determine Theatre Twist (Attacker selects Theatre, roll D6 for Twist)
Determine Attacker and Defender (Campaign Attack player is Attacker)
Determine First Turn (roll off unless mission states otherwise)

reservesRestrictions.maxUnitsInReserves: No more than half number of units
reservesRestrictions.maxPointsInReserves: No more than half total points
reservesRestrictions.destroyedIfNotArrived: By end of round 3 — count as destroyed (except units placed into Strategic Reserves during battle)

vespatorFrontEvents.when: After Results step each Campaign phase
vespatorFrontEvents.dominatingAlliance: 5+ Campaign points ahead of each other — roll D6: on 4+, generate Perils of Power Event
vespatorFrontEvents.trailingAlliance: 5+ Campaign points behind each other — roll D6: on 4+, generate Desperate Measures Event
vespatorFrontEvents.fortunesOfWar: Roll D6 (+1 if phase 4+): on 4+, generate Fortunes of War Event (D33)

campaignMedals.LAUREL_OF_VICTORY: Victorious Alliance — Benefit: chosen planet in next campaign gets exclusive bonus setup
campaignMedals.PENUMBRAL_WREATH: Alliance with most planets at Power Level 1 — Benefit: +2 Power Level at 2 chosen planets at start
campaignMedals.STAR_OF_THE_VOIDFARER: Alliance with Support Facilities furthest apart — Benefit: Fleets can move twice in first Move Fleets step
campaignMedals.SABLE_DAGGER: Alliance with Fleets furthest apart — Benefit: can swap Power Levels between 2 planets up to 3 times at setup
